summary: Completed testing of AI-powered document analysis and biometric verification features. Backend APIs all passing (12/12 tests), frontend 3-step workflow functioning correctly with proper AI integration via Gemini.

minor.issue: Fixed: MongoDB _id serialization issue - added {'_id': 0} projection

issues: Camera access denied in headless browser testing (expected behavior) - proper error handling with Retry button displayed

critical_code_review_comments: Good implementation: AI document analysis uses Gemini with proper prompts for different document types
Good: Proper error handling for AI analysis failures with fallback responses
Good: data-testid attributes present on key interactive elements (progress-steps, step-1-card, document-type-select, file-input, verify-btn, etc.)
Good: Toast notifications for analysis completion and errors
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend AI endpoints fully tested. Frontend 3-step workflow validated. Biometric verification is SIMULATED (generates random confidence score 85-95%). Camera access will fail in headless testing - this is expected. MongoDB _id serialization issue was fixed in ai_routes.py. Full user journey tested: login -> upload document -> view analysis results (with Gemini AI) -> proceed to identity verification step.

features_tested.document_upload: Working - supports PDF, JPG, PNG, TXT
features_tested.ai_analysis_with_gemini: Working - confidence scores, discrepancies, key information extraction, recommendations all displayed

analysis_status_handling.suspicious: Shows warning, blocks progression - working correctly

features_tested.step_progression: Working - Step 1 -> Step 2 (when document passes analysis)
features_tested.webcam_verification: UI loads correctly, camera permission handling works with error display
features_tested.biometric_api: Working - simulated verification with configurable confidence scores
features_tested.form_submission_api: Working - creates notarization request with session_id and analysis_id

mocked_features.biometric_verification: MOCKED - Generates random confidence score 85-95% instead of actual face recognition
